description: CCP-16 Load Balancing vectors (da2q multi-channel). Covers gateway channel assignment, load metrics in DIO extensions, and balancing decisions. Python reference is source of truth.

vectors.name: gateway_channel_assignment
vectors.description: DIO with load factor triggering channel rebalance (CCP-16).

vectors.name: tdma_slot_assignment
vectors.description: Beacon-driven TDMA slot with density-aware guard time.

vectors.name: adaptive_sf_density
vectors.description: SF adaptation: SF7 for high SNR/low density, SF12 for high density. Matches mitigateInterference logic. Uses snr_ema per pseudocode.

vectors.name: multi_channel_load_balance
vectors.description: Multi-channel load distribution across 8 channels with gateway coordination.

vectors.name: interference_mitigation_full
vectors.description: Full combined algorithm test: high density triggers SF10, channel agility avoids busy ch, density guard=50+67. Uses now() for select_channel.

vectors.name: select_channel_blacklist
vectors.description: now_ts skips blacklisted ch (IF now_ts < blacklist_until[ch]). Matches pseudocode line 301. now() from TDMA.

vectors.name: select_channel_hysteresis_dwell
vectors.description: Hysteresis bonus (current_ch) and dwell penalty (now_ts - last_used < MIN_DWELL_MS). Score calc tested. Matches pseudocode 308, 310.

vectors.name: select_channel_per_blacklist
vectors.description: Switch triggers blacklist (per > PER_BLACKLIST_THRESH). Updates blacklist_until = now_ts + BLACKLIST_MS. Matches 314-315.

vectors.name: select_channel_min_switch
vectors.description: MIN_SWITCH_INTERVAL_MS prevents switch even if better score. now() used for interval check. Matches 316.

vectors.name: now_tdma_hash32
vectors.description: now() feeds select_channel; hash_32(sfn, eui64) per spec (pure eui64, sfn-first param order to match link layer short_addr). Tests monotonic TDMA time from lichen_tdma_init.
